title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 620.990 - Bylaws and rules authorized
text:
620.990.  Bylaws and rules authorized. — To accomplish the purposes of sections 620.950 to 620.990, the authority shall adopt such bylaws, rules, and regulations as it deems necessary for the conduct of its business and affairs and for the management and use of facilities, projects, and sites acquired under the powers granted under the provisions of sections 620.950 to 620.990.
(L. 1983 H.B. 399 § 24, Repealed L. 1995 H.B. 574 § A, A.L. 1995 S.B. 3)
